'''竏喇-zh-ch''' ('''kahazhach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knowleche|knowleche]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-zh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knowleche|knowleche]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喇-zh-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kahazhach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihazhach|thihazhach]] || [[word:jihazhach|jihazhach]] || [[word:shihazhach|shihazhach]] || [[word:kihazhach|kihazhach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhazhach|thuthuhazhach]] || [[word:jujuhazhach|jujuhazhach]] || [[word:shushuhazhach|shushuhazhach]] || [[word:kukuhazhach|kukuhazhach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhazhach|thuhazhach]] || [[word:juhazhach|juhazhach]] || [[word:shuhazhach|shuhazhach]] || [[word:kuhazhach|kuhazhach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhazhach|thuhazhach]] || [[word:juhazhach|juhazhach]] || [[word:shuhazhach|shuhazhach]] || [[word:kuhazhach|kuhazhach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehazhach|thehazhach]] || [[word:jehazhach|jehazhach]] || [[word:shehazhach|shehazhach]] || [[word:kehazhach|kehazhach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohazhach|thothohazhach]] || [[word:jojohazhach|jojohazhach]] || [[word:shoshohazhach|shoshohazhach]] || [[word:kokohazhach|kokohazhach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohazhach|thohazhach]] || [[word:johazhach|johazhach]] || [[word:shohazhach|shohazhach]] || [[word:kohazhach|kohazhach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohazhach|thohazhach]] || [[word:johazhach|johazhach]] || [[word:shohazhach|shohazhach]] || [[word:kohazhach|kohazhach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦhazhach|thﾃｦhazhach]] || [[word:jﾃｦhazhach|jﾃｦhazhach]] || [[word:shﾃｦhazhach|shﾃｦhazhach]] || [[word:kﾃｦhazhach|kﾃｦhazhach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahazhach|thathahazhach]] || [[word:jajahazhach|jajahazhach]] || [[word:shashahazhach|shashahazhach]] || [[word:kakahazhach|kakahazhach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahazhach|thahazhach]] || [[word:jahazhach|jahazhach]] || [[word:shahazhach|shahazhach]] || [[word:kahazhach|kahazhach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahazhach|thahazhach]] || [[word:jahazhach|jahazhach]] || [[word:shahazhach|shahazhach]] || [[word:kahazhach|kahazhach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahazhach|shahazhach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahazhach|goshahazhach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahazhach|gokishahazhach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahazhachnﾃｼ|shahazhachnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahazhachnknﾃｼ|goshahazhachnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazhachnﾃｼ|gokishahazhachnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahazhachshﾃｫ|shahazhachshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahazhachnkshﾃｫ|goshahazhachnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahazhachshﾃｫ|gokishahazhachshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazhachro|shahazhachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazhachnkro|goshahazhachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazhachro|gokishahazhachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazhachmu|shahazhachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazhachnkmu|goshahazhachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazhachmu|gokishahazhachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahazhachsher|shahazhachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahazhachnksher|goshahazhachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahazhachsher|gokishahazhachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahazhachng|shahazhachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahazhachnkng|goshahazhachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahazhachng|gokishahazhachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahazhachya|shahazhachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahazhachnkya|goshahazhachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahazhachya|gokishahazhachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahazhachyam|shahazhachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahazhachnkyam|goshahazhachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahazhachyam|gokishahazhachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahazhachnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shahazhachnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahazhachnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshahazhachnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahazhachnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishahazhachnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazhachnﾃｼro|shahazhachnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazhachnknﾃｼro|goshahazhachnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazhachnﾃｼro|gokishahazhachnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazhachnﾃｼmu|shahazhachnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazhachnknﾃｼmu|goshahazhachnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazhachnﾃｼmu|gokishahazhachnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahazhachshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shahazhachshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahazhachnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshahazhachnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazhachshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishahazhachshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazhachshﾃｫro|shahazhachshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazhachnkshﾃｫro|goshahazhachnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazhachshﾃｫro|gokishahazhachshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazhachshﾃｫmu|shahazhachshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazhachnkshﾃｫmu|goshahazhachnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazhachshﾃｫmu|gokishahazhachshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahazhachronﾃｼ|shahazhachronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahazhachnkronﾃｼ|goshahazhachnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazhachronﾃｼ|gokishahazhachronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahazhachroshﾃｫ|shahazhachroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahazhachnkroshﾃｫ|goshahazhachnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahazhachroshﾃｫ|gokishahazhachroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazhachromu|shahazhachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazhachnkromu|goshahazhachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazhachromu|gokishahazhachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahazhachmunﾃｼ|shahazhachmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahazhachnkmunﾃｼ|goshahazhachnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazhachmunﾃｼ|gokishahazhachmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahazhachmushﾃｫ|shahazhachmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahazhachnkmushﾃｫ|goshahazhachnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahazhachmushﾃｫ|gokishahazhachmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazhachmuro|shahazhachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazhachnkmuro|goshahazhachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazhachmuro|gokishahazhachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
